curation_notes: Patch commit b24aa46f adds a URL scheme check in JdbcUtils.getConnection to restrict JNDI lookups to the 'java:' scheme only. The vulnerability allowed attacker-controlled LDAP/RMI URLs to be passed to context.lookup(), enabling remote class loading and insecure deserialization. Pre-assigned class 'insecure-deserialization' (CWE-502) is correct — the JNDI injection vector leads to deserialization of untrusted objects from remote servers. Only one non-test source file was modified. No sibling files contain the same vulnerable JNDI lookup pattern.
